commercial_benchmark._MANDATORY: Every upgrade MUST be measured against COMMERCIAL_BENCHMARK.md. If it does not shrink a gap below, it is cosmetic.
commercial_benchmark.fundamental_blocker: PARTIALLY RESOLVED THROUGH SESSION-032: the original WFC/shader/export break is now closed by a lightweight PDG runtime and a USD-like scene contract. The main remaining blockers are industrial runtime depth (cache/partition/layering), benchmarked asset production, visual quality, and the simulation-conditioned neural-render bridge.

strategic_paths.path_a_physics_motion_engine: FULLY DELIVERED THROUGH SESSION-035: PhysDiff + biomechanics + compliant PD tracking (DeepMimic) + MuJoCo contacts + RL locomotion + ASE + AMP adversarial motion priors + VPoser latent-space mutation + Layer 3 evolution with convergence bridge + compact human-math layer (SMPL-like shape latents, VPoser-style pose prior, 2D motion matching, dual-quaternion backend).
strategic_paths.path_b_ai_visual_polish: Now better conditioned by anatomically valid low-dimensional motion data; next step is ControlNet / diffusion export from the distilled body and pose representation.
strategic_paths.path_c_architecture_closure: SESSION-032 delivered a first working closure through a lightweight PDG + USD-like scene description. Next step: PDG v2 semantics, OpenUSD-compatible interchange, and conditioned neural-render export.

current_focus: SESSION-035 delivered Compliant Physics & Adversarial Motion Priors: DeepMimic-style compliant PD tracking replaces rigid spring-damper as default physics mode. AMP LSGAN discriminator (30% weight) and VPoser naturalness scoring (10% weight) augment Layer 3 fitness. VPoser latent-space encode/decode/mutate/interpolate/score API for anatomically-legal pose manipulation. LAYER3_CONVERGENCE_BRIDGE.json auto-feeds evaluation results into produce_character_pack() parameter selection (Gap #3 fix). 8 new knowledge rules. Gap audit: #1 confirmed fixed, #2 tracked as P1-PHASE-35A, #3 fixed, #4 tracked as P1-BENCH-35A. 30/30 audit checks pass. Code delta: +~1,300 lines.

trigger_when: The user explicitly asks for precise, parallel, global, or comprehensive research
A subsystem upgrade is blocked by missing external knowledge
The session risks becoming superficial, repetitive, or formal without new ideas
A multi-session gap needs stronger benchmarks, implementation references, or production standards

explicit_trigger_phrases.standard: 启动精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.gap_focused: 围绕当前最大差距做去重并行搜索
explicit_trigger_phrases.feature_focused: 针对这个功能做精准并行参考全网信息
explicit_trigger_phrases.anti_drift: 如果你判断当前升级可能流于形式，立即启动研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.research_first: 先按研究协议补足参考，再开始实现
explicit_trigger_phrases.dedup_focused: 按去重机制并行搜索，不要重复已有资料
explicit_trigger_phrases.landing_focused: 只收集能直接指导项目落地实现的资料
explicit_trigger_phrases.soft_trigger: 优先启用精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.hard_trigger: 本轮禁止直接开做，必须先启动精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.deep_reading: 这篇论文/这个仓库是指路明灯，认真研读每一个细节
explicit_trigger_phrases.full_standard_command: 启动精准并行研究协议：围绕当前差距做去重并行搜索，只保留能直接指导 MarioTrickster-MathArt 落地升级的高价值资料。

research_trigger_policy.deep_reading_trigger_rule: When the user names a specific paper, repo, or documentation as the primary reference (e.g., 'this paper is your guiding light'), MUST switch from parallel scanning to Deep Reading Protocol. Parallel discovery finds WHAT to build; Deep Reading finds HOW to build it. Never skip Deep Reading for North Star sources.
research_trigger_policy.phrase_interpretation_rule: Close paraphrases should count as valid triggers when the intent is clearly precise, parallel, dedup-aware, implementation-relevant research.
stop_when: Two or more strong sources support the same practical conclusion
New results are mostly duplicates or weaker restatements
The next code change is already clear
The bottleneck is engineering rather than missing knowledge

pending_tasks.title: Phase-driven coverage for jump/fall/hit + CLI trunk enforcement
pending_tasks.description: Ensure all animation actions (jump, fall, hit, etc.) go through phase-driven path instead of legacy sin()-based animation. Update cli.py to use main trunk pipeline instead of bypassing it.

pending_tasks.title: End-to-end trunk reproducibility validation
pending_tasks.description: Create a zero-to-export integration test that validates every module (physics, biomechanics, phase-driven, evolution, rendering, export) participates in the main trunk. Distinct from P1-NEW-10 which focuses on asset quality benchmarks.

pending_tasks.title: Industrial renderer integration into AssetPipeline
pending_tasks.description: Wire render_character_frame_industrial() as an optional rendering backend in produce_character_pack(). Allow users to select Dead Cells-style or classic rendering.

pending_tasks.title: Runtime motion matching query for real-time animation
pending_tasks.description: Extend MotionMatchingEvaluator from batch evaluation to frame-by-frame runtime query with transition synthesis and inertia blending.

pending_tasks.title: 3D-to-2D mesh rendering path (Dead Cells full workflow)
pending_tasks.description: Implement actual 3D mesh to 2D pixel art pipeline following Dead Cells workflow: 3D skeletal animation -> orthographic render -> no-AA downscale -> normal-map cel shade.

pending_tasks.title: Global Distillation Bus (The Brain)
pending_tasks.description: Wire RuleCompiler to automatically inject ParameterSpace into all modules at runtime instead of hardcoding.

pending_tasks.title: Gait transition blending (walk/run/sneak)
pending_tasks.description: Smooth phase-preserving blending between gait modes during speed changes. Maintain phase continuity across walk<->run transitions.

pending_tasks.title: Terrain-adaptive phase modulation
pending_tasks.description: Phase advancement responds to slope, surface type, and obstacles. Uphill slows phase, downhill accelerates, uneven terrain adds asymmetry.

pending_tasks.title: Animation preview / visualization tool
pending_tasks.description: Generate sprite sheet or GIF from phase-driven animation for visual validation without running the full pipeline.

pending_tasks.title: PDG v2 runtime semantics
pending_tasks.description: Add cache keys, partition / collect, fan-out / fan-in orchestration, and reusable work-item attributes to the lightweight DAG runtime.

pending_tasks.title: OpenUSD-compatible scene interchange
pending_tasks.description: Extend the lightweight scene description into layered composition and export/import compatible serialization.

pending_tasks.title: Rich topology-aware level semantics
pending_tasks.description: Promote scene prims beyond ASCII counts into surfaces, adjacency, traversal lanes, and decoration anchors.

pending_tasks.title: Simulation-conditioned neural rendering bridge
pending_tasks.description: Export physics / scene / mask constraints from the new scene contract into ComfyUI / Wan-style rendering backends.

pending_tasks.title: Distill Verlet & Gait Parameters
pending_tasks.description: Research and distill physics stability and procedural gait parameters into knowledge/.

pending_tasks.title: Distill Cognitive Science Rules
pending_tasks.description: Research and distill phase relationships and biological motion perception rules.

pending_tasks.title: Math-to-AI Pipeline Prototype
pending_tasks.description: Export skeleton/pose data as ControlNet inputs for external AI diffusion models.

pending_tasks.title: Physics-driven Particle System
pending_tasks.description: Upgrade SDF VFX to use emitters, gravity, and collision.

pending_tasks.title: Character evolution 3.0: expand part registry
pending_tasks.description: Expand the part registry beyond hats and face accessories to include torso overlays, hand items, and foot accessories.

pending_tasks.title: Production benchmark asset suite
pending_tasks.description: Create benchmark characters, tiles, and VFX with structured metadata, acceptance thresholds, and automated validators.

pending_tasks.title: Per-frame SDF parameter animation
pending_tasks.description: Add keyframed SDF parameter tracks and true shape evolution over time.

pending_tasks.title: Reaction-diffusion textures
pending_tasks.description: Add Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion for organic textures.

pending_tasks.title: Quality checkpoint mid-generation
pending_tasks.description: Wire ArtMathQualityController mid-generation checkpoint into longer searches.

pending_tasks.title: Metabolic Engine: ATP/Lactate Fatigue Model
pending_tasks.description: Research-driven: ATP consumption + lactate accumulation math model (Hill-type muscle, Michaelis-Menten kinetics). When lactate threshold exceeded, reduce joint max torque → motion becomes heavy/staggering. Output body temperature parameter for ControlNet conditioning (flushed skin, sweat highlights in ComfyUI).
masters: Scott Delp (Stanford, OpenSim founder, musculoskeletal + biochemical simulation)
search_keywords: Metabolic Energy Cost in Character Animation

pending_tasks.title: MPM & Phase Change Simulation
pending_tasks.description: Research-driven: Material Point Method for terrain interaction — snow compaction/melting, mud drying/hardening (solid↔liquid phase change). Compute material state as 2D mask for ComfyUI (wet/dry regions, deformation footprints).
masters: Chenfanfu Jiang (UCLA, Hollywood MPM for snow/mud/fluid VFX)
search_keywords: Differentiable Material Point Method (MPM) for Phase Change

pending_tasks.title: Reaction-Diffusion & Thermodynamics for Surface Chemistry
pending_tasks.description: Research-driven: Turing patterns / Navier-Stokes for chemical texture evolution — rust on armor (acid rain), fire spread on cloth, poison diffusion on skin. Output texture evolution maps as diffusion model guidance. Supersedes P2-3 (basic reaction-diffusion) with full thermodynamics.
masters: Ron Fedkiw (Stanford, ILM, Oscar winner — fluid mechanics + combustion VFX)
Nils Thuerey (TUM — deep learning + complex physics/fluid simulation)

pending_tasks.title: Procedural outline variation
pending_tasks.description: Partially addressed by adaptive outline width. Full per-segment style variation remains open.

pending_tasks.title: Test coverage for missing modules
pending_tasks.description: Add dedicated test files for mathart/shader, mathart/workspace, and mathart/quality modules.

pending_tasks.title: Auto knowledge distillation
pending_tasks.notes: 12 rules distilled manually. Auto-distillation not yet implemented.

pending_tasks.title: README update for SESSION-018~026 features
pending_tasks.description: Completed in SESSION-027 audit phase.

pending_tasks.title: Integrate SMPL-like shape latents into CharacterGenotype and rendering pipeline
pending_tasks.description: Promote SESSION-031 shape latent controls from standalone module utilities into genotype serialization, phenotype decoding, and author-facing pipeline knobs.

pending_tasks.title: Add motion transition blending and pose warping after 2D motion matching retrieval
pending_tasks.description: Current SESSION-031 motion matching performs compact retrieval; next step is seamless transition synthesis, clip stitching, and anticipation-aware query scheduling.

pending_tasks.title: Pseudo-3D paper-doll / mesh-shell backend using dual quaternions
pending_tasks.description: Use the new dual-quaternion backend to drive 2.5D limbs, volumetric shells, or lightweight mesh deformation without abandoning the current 2D-first workflow.

recent_audit.summary: SESSION-035 delivered Compliant Physics & Adversarial Motion Priors based on deep reading of three north-star academic sources: DeepMimic (Peng, SIGGRAPH 2018), AMP (Peng, SIGGRAPH 2021), and VPoser (Ghorbani et al., CVPR 2019). Compliant PD tracking replaces rigid spring-damper as default physics mode with per-joint compliance map. AMP LSGAN discriminator (30% weight) and VPoser naturalness scoring (10% weight) augment Layer 3 fitness. VPoser latent-space encode/decode/mutate/interpolate/score API for anatomically-legal pose manipulation. LAYER3_CONVERGENCE_BRIDGE.json auto-feeds evaluation results into produce_character_pack() (Gap #3 fix). 8 new knowledge rules. Gap audit: #1 confirmed fixed, #2 tracked as P1-PHASE-35A, #3 fixed, #4 tracked as P1-BENCH-35A. Full 30-point audit confirmed all research claims landed in code. Code delta: +~1,300 lines.
